The Experience

Every Visit,
An Unforgettable Night.

From the sophisticated lounge ambience to the electrifying poolside nights and the finest cuisine in Umuahia — De-Latinos delivers luxury in every detail.

VIP Lounge

Sink into our bespoke seating surrounded by warm amber lighting and premium service. The lounge is where Umuahia's finest unwind in absolute comfort.

Premium Cocktails VIP Cabanas Gold Service

Poolside Club

Suspended disco balls shimmer over our pristine pool as the DJ drops the night's best sets. Live football on the giant screen makes every match day an event.

Giant Screen Disco Balls Pool Bar

Daily Feast Foods

Our in-house restaurant serves an exquisite menu of continental and local cuisine daily. Pair your meal with live band entertainment for the complete De-Latinos experience.

Daily Menu Live Band Fine Dining
Poolside & Events

Where Every Night Becomes a Memory.

Giant Screen Football

Watch live Premier League, Champions League, and AFCON matches on our massive outdoor screen right by the pool — surrounded by your crew.

Hanging Disco Ball Canopy

Our iconic chrome disco balls suspended above the water create a hypnotic light show that transforms the atmosphere as the night deepens.

Live Band Performances

Experience our resident live band bringing the energy with Afrobeats, Highlife, and contemporary sounds from the Daily Feast stage every weekend.

Premium Sunbeds & Cabanas

Stretch out on our luxury wicker sunbeds poolside. Reserve a private cabana for your group and receive dedicated butler service throughout the night.

Friday Night Splash

Giant Screen Match Days

About Us

The Landmark of
Luxury in Umuahia.

De-Latinos Concepts Ltd. is Umuahia's most celebrated luxury hospitality and entertainment destination. Set on BCA Road, our multi-level complex houses a world-class lounge, a vibrant poolside club, the beloved Daily Feast Foods restaurant, and a dedicated live band stage — all under one stunning roof.

  • Multi-level luxury venue complex on BCA Road
  • Daily Feast Foods — fine dining restaurant & bar
  • Heated pool with iconic overhead disco-ball canopy
  • Live band entertainment every weekend
  • Private event hosting, VIP table reservations
